examples: The bank species was thought to resemble the muskrat in behavior, living in burrows or lodges and unable to build dams.
And it looks like muskrat love.
Officials say muskrat holes caused that breach.
At the preserve pond, my occasional swim was observed by a slick, slime-covered rat-tailed muskrat.
Mr. Noseworthy of Fur Harvesters says he doesn't expect the muskrat-belly market to collapse disastrously.
